root_text.an9.73:2.1: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ sikkhādubbalyānaṁ pahānāya cattāro sammappadhānā bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an9.73:2.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu anuppannānaṁ pāpakānaṁ akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ anuppādāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati;
root_text.an9.73:2.4: uppannānaṁ pāpakānaṁ akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati;
root_text.an9.73:2.5: anuppannānaṁ kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati;
root_text.an9.73:2.6: uppannānaṁ kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ ṭhitiyā asammosāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya bhāvanāya pāripūriyā chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati.
root_text.an9.73:2.7: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ sikkhādubbalyānaṁ pahānāya ime cattāro sammappadhānā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an9.73:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five weaknesses when you’re training.
translation_text.an9.73:1.3: Killing living creatures, stealing, sexual misconduct, lying, and consuming beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an9.73:1.4: These are the five weaknesses when you’re training.
translation_text.an9.73:2.1: To give up these five weaknesses in your training you should develop the four right efforts.
translation_text.an9.73:2.3: It’s when a mendicant generates enthusiasm, tries, makes an effort, exerts the mind, and strives so that bad, unskillful qualities don’t arise.
translation_text.an9.73:2.4: They generate enthusiasm, try, make an effort, exert the mind, and strive so that bad, unskillful qualities that have arisen are given up.
translation_text.an9.73:2.5: They generate enthusiasm, try, make an effort, exert the mind, and strive so that skillful qualities arise.
translation_text.an9.73:2.6: They generate enthusiasm, try, make an effort, exert the mind, and strive so that skillful qualities that have arisen remain, are not lost, but increase, mature, and are completed by development.
translation_text.an9.73:2.7: To give up these five weaknesses in your training you should develop these four right efforts.”
